word: G1817 - ἐξανίστημι - exanístēmi - ex-an-is'-tay-mee - Raise up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξανίστημι

- Transliteration: Exanistemi

- Phonetic: ex-an-is'-tay-mee

- Definition:

1. to make to rise up, to rise up, to produce

2. to rise (in an assembly to speak)

- Origin: from G1537 and G450

- TDNT entry: 07:08,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G450; objectively to produce that is (figuratively) beget; subjectively to arise that is (figuratively) object: - raise (rise) up.
